title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.172 - Reduction or denial of benefits, basis for, restrictions on
text:
208.172.  Reduction or denial of benefits, basis for, restrictions on. — Increases in assessed valuations of property pursuant to sections 137.010 to 137.960 shall not be the sole basis for a reduction in or denial of benefits under this chapter.
(L. 1985 S.B. 152) 
Effective 12-31-85
